title: Reuters | Breaking International News & Views
meta_description: Find latest news from every corner of the globe at Reuters.com, your online source for breaking international news coverage.
text_content: Iran crisis Maps and charts Iran's missile threat How Trump's goals have shifted ago Trump, Iran threaten power, energy targets as war escalates Responding to Trump's threat to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants if Tehran does not fully reopen the Strait ‌of Hormuz within 48 hours, Iran warned it would target US infrastructure, including energy facilities in the Gulf, in retaliation. The Callisto tanker sits anchored as the traffic is down in the Strait of Hormuz, amid the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran, in Muscat, Oman, March 10, 2026. REUTERS/Benoit Tessier/File Photo ago Three weeks in, Iran war escalates beyond Trump's control The lack of a clear exit strategy carries risks for Trump's legacy and his party's political prospects. ago Exclusive: Patriot missile involved in Bahrain blast likely US-operated, analysis finds An American-operated Patriot air defense battery likely fired the interceptor missile involved in a pre-dawn explosion that injured dozens of civilians and tore through homes in U.S.-ally Bahrain 10 days into the war on Iran, according to an analysis by academic researchers examined by Reuters. More Top Stories ago Paris and Marseille in focus as French vote in local election runoffs ago Four years after deadly China Eastern plane crash, investigators offer no answers ago Robert Mueller, special counsel who probed but did not charge Trump, dies at 81 ago Trump threatens to put ICE agents in airports over funding impasse Energy ago Iran war's energy impact forces world to pay up, cut consumption "You're not going to conserve your way around this." ago Who hurts most as Iran war hits global economy? A crisis in energy supply sooner or later will hit every corner of the global economy. March 20, 2026 Exclusive: Iraq declares force majeure on foreign-operated oilfields Most Iraqi crude exports transit the Strait, and the disruptions have caused storage capacity ​to reach its limits, the oil ministry said in a letter dated March 17 and seen ​by Reuters. Commentary Reuters Open Interest Breakingviews Qatar has options amid Gulf’s worst financial hit Doha’s GDP could sink ​13% in 2026, amid attacks that have taken out ‌17% of LNG capacity. Its local banks have faced big deposit outflows before. If Qatar has to cover lost revenue and liquidity, its $580 ​bln wealth fund can sell assets and its ​central bank can sell gold. George Hay March 20, 2026 Energy shock will make hoarding the new normal Una Galani March 20, 2026 Iran war fallout lands hardest on Europe's most gas‑dependent nations Gavin Maguire March 19, 2026 United States ago As New Mexico investigates, questions arise about Epstein's links to power Attention has focused on former politicians in the state who continued to meet and receive campaign donations from Jeffrey Epstein long after he became a registered ​sex offender. REUTERS/Drone Base Commentary Transactional category Epstein files upend lawsuit over stock options by longevity expert Peter Attia Attia sued Oura Ring and its Finnish parent, claiming the start-up reneged on its promise to grant him equity. Oura said it never would have allowed Attia to become involved with the company had it known of his ties to Epstein. Jenna Greene Cuba ago Cuba refuses to negotiate president's term in talks with United States USA Today reported that Trump was preparing an economic deal with Cuba that would relax trade restrictions but include an "off-ramp" for Miguel Díaz-Canel. The New ​York Times later reported that the Trump administration was seeking to push him from power. REUTERS/Norlys Perez ago Cuban power grid collapses for second time in a week amid US oil blockade Cuba has experienced a series of major outages in recent years, but two total failures in the space of a week is exceptional. Business & Markets ago Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle Tencent launched a tool on Sunday to ​integrate its WeChat messaging platform with the OpenClaw ‌agent, deepening its push into AI agents that have become a key battleground among China's technology companies. Tencent's logo is displayed at its booth at the China International Fair for Trade in Services (CIFTIS) in Beijing, China, September 11, 2025.
